user.title: Lemonade HA — Connection
user.description: Enter the address where Lemonade is running. Default is localhost:8000.

models.title: Lemonade HA — Models
models.description: Choose which models to use. These must already be downloaded via the Lemonade HA add-on.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Lemonade at the given host and port. Make sure Lemonade is running.

abort.already_configured: Lemonade HA is already configured for this host.
